response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with a strong craftsmanship background, but the profile diverges sharply from this role's core requirements. His career centers on web and product development in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; hands-on C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over two decades ago and a thesis project, and C++ is absent from his current skills list. There is no evidence of MQTT, message-broker architectures at industrial scale, SDL/IEC 62443 practices, or industrial automation domain exposure. He also far exceeds the 8–12 year experience band, suggesting a seniority and compensation mismatch for a hands-on C++ developer role.
strengths: Deep low-latency and concurrent-systems experience (async I/O, fibers, high-throughput services at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
Broad polyglot background spanning embedded, desktop, web, and mobile systems
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience; core stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not C++/STL
No exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or industrial automation/cybersecurity domains
Experience level (~30 years) well outside the 8–12 year target profile for this role
